name: Walnut Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and shortening thoroughly.
2. Add sugar gradually, mixing after each addition until light.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time.
4. Alternate adding 2 cups of flour with milk mixed for vanilla flavoring.
5. Incorporate the remaining 1 cup of flour, salt, and baking powder mixture.
6. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
7. Pour batter into a lightly greased and floured tube pan.
8. Place cake in cold oven on middle shelf.
9. Turn oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Avoid opening the door for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
11. Let cake cool in the pan on a wire rack.
